parameters.query:
INSERT INTO tickets (ticket_id, name, email, subject, message, source_channel, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.subject }}',
  '{{ $json.message }}',
  '{{ $json.source_channel }}',
  'RECEIVED'
)
ON CONFLICT (ticket_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, ticket_id, status, created_at;

INSERT INTO ticket_audit_logs (ticket_id, event_type, event_data, workflow_name, node_name)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code: Generate Ticket ID').item.json.ticket_id }}',
  'TICKET_RECEIVED',
  '{"source": "{{ $('Code: Generate Ticket ID').item.json.source_channel }}", "email": "{{ $('Code: Generate Ticket ID').item.json.email }}"}',
  '01 - Ticket Intake',
  'PostgreSQL: Insert Ticket'
);

meta.description: Receives support tickets via webhook, validates fields, generates ticket ID, persists to PostgreSQL, and triggers AI classification workflow.
